destinations.evidence: The delivery settlement builder derives a delivery SPC call from the raw delivery result/proof and stores it on the AsyncSettlement transaction.
The dependency transaction type carries delivery_spc_calls through RLP encoding/decoding and exposes them through the Transaction trait while clearing runtime fields for signing/hash stability.
The port storage codec preserves delivery_spc_calls through compact storage round trips.
RPC receipt construction exposes delivery_spc_calls alongside normal SPC calls.

equivalence_argument: The port populates delivery_spc_calls at Phase 2 settlement construction, the alloy transaction type serializes/deserializes and delegates the field while keeping canonical signing/hash identity stable, the port storage codec round-trips it, and receipts expose the same trait field.
rationale: The primary diff populates delivery_spc_calls on settlement construction, adds transaction delegation for delivery_spc_calls, includes the field in receipts, and updates settlement codec handling. The commit title explicitly calls out receipt support. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: AsyncSettlement transactions created for Phase 2 delivery must carry delivery_spc_calls derived from the delivery result/proof, preserve those calls through transaction trait delegation and compact/RLP paths, and expose them in RPC receipts.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create a Phase 2 delivery settlement with known delivery result/proof, round-trip it through the async settlement codec/RLP path, and fetch its RPC receipt; assert delivery_spc_calls contains the expected SpcCall while canonical transaction hash behavior remains stable.
summary: Delivery SPC calls are populated by the port and preserved through transaction, storage, and receipt surfaces.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create a delivery settlement with a known delivery SPC call, RLP round-trip it, compact-storage round-trip it, and build an RPC receipt; assert the call remains present while the transaction hash is unchanged by runtime SPC fields.
title: Delivery SPC calls are preserved and exposed
